description: modules/hosts.nix has 5 near-identical builder configuration blocks (spectre, ash, shirka, ash-devbox, spectre-devbox) all sharing enable=true, speedFactor=10. Darwin hosts use maxJobs=8, Linux use maxJobs=4, with different sshUser conventions. Extract a mkBuilder helper that takes host-specific params (keys, maxJobs, sshUser) and generates the builder config. Document the darwin/linux convention difference.
title: Extract builder configuration helper in hosts.nix
